stemHtml: What is the true about the pulmonary circulatory system and the systemic circulatory system?

options.a: The pulmonary system carries deoxygenated blood from the heart to the lungs and then oxygenated blood from the lungs back to the heart.
options.b: The systemic system carries deoxygenated blood from the heart to the body, and oxygenated blood back to the heart.
options.c: The systemic system carries deoxygenated blood from the heart to the lungs and then oxygenated blood from the lungs back to the heart.
options.d: The pulmonary system carries oxygenated blood from the heart to the body, and oxygenated blood back to the heart.
